description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add an update_readme job that runs a curl POST request using the $README_TOKEN variable to trigger the pipeline of project 7064305 with variable single_repo=hadockermon. In the deploy stage add a push_github job that first downloads and executes the init.sh script from ludeeus/toolbox with arguments github HA-Custom_components root /hadockermon, then downloads and runs push.sh with the Europe/Oslo argument. Use the default runner image (no explicit Docker image or services) and run on all branches without additional rules.
